artPrompt: A rigid human zealot in bone-white robes stands eternally alert at the edge of a candlelit revival square, arms crossed, cold gold halo light glinting off narrowed unblinking eyes that watch and judge. The looming clock tower and a blood-dark sky loom behind, smoke and ash drifting past. Imposing full-figure film-still framing of vigilant menace, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Zealous Poll Watcher
text:
Vigilance
Whenever an opponent votes, recounts, or holds an election, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and Zealous Poll Watcher gets +1/+0 until end of turn. The end-times faction monitors every precinct.
flavorText: "I'm not here to vote. I'm here to watch you regret it."
